---
title: "Measles Global Analysis"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    embed-resources: true
    theme: journal
    scrolling: true
    logo: measles.png
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/aryanajithnair/STAT-431
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:ajithnai@calpoly.edu
server: shiny
---

# Global Measles Cases

```{r}
#| label: packages-setup-and-load-data
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(httr)
library(tidyjson)
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(gt)
library(paletteer)
library(ggridges)
library(broom)
library(gganimate)
library(leaflet)
library(gifski)
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)




cases_month <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_month.csv')
cases_year <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_year.csv')
meta_df <- read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zeetahhh/measles-analysis/main/mg%20copy.csv")

trend_label <- function(current, previous) {
  pct_change <- (current - previous) / previous * 100
  case_when(
    pct_change < -20 ~ "declining",
    pct_change >  20 ~ "surging",
    .default = "stable"
  )
}
```


## Column - Summary Table {width="45%"}

### Row - Table 1

::: {.card title="Table 1: Global Measles Cases by Year"}
```{r}
#| label: gt-table-rq1
# --code-- Insert table 1 of global cases by year

yearly_summary <- cases_year |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(
    total_cases = sum(measles_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_countries = n_distinct(country),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(year) |>
  mutate(
    prev_total = lag(total_cases),
    pct_change = round((total_cases - prev_total) / prev_total * 100, 1),
    trend = trend_label(total_cases, prev_total)
  ) |>
  select(year, total_cases, n_countries, pct_change, trend)

yearly_summary |>
  select(year, total_cases, n_countries, pct_change, trend) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_label(
    year = md("**Year**"),
    total_cases = md("**Total Cases**"),
    n_countries = md("**Countries Reporting**"),
    pct_change = md("**% Change from Prior Year**"),
    trend = md("**Trend**")
  ) |>
  fmt_number(columns = total_cases, use_seps = TRUE, decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_number(columns = n_countries, use_seps = TRUE, decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_number(columns = pct_change, decimals = 1, suffix = "%") |>
  data_color(
    columns = pct_change,
    fn = scales::col_numeric(
      palette = c("#D9565C", "#FFFFFF", "#647D4B"),
      domain  = c(-100, 200)
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#D9565C", weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = trend, rows = trend == "declining")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#647D4B", weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = trend, rows = trend == "surging")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#848C80"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = trend, rows = trend == "stable")
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**Case Counts**"),
    columns = c(total_cases, n_countries)
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**Year-over-Year Change**"),
    columns = c(pct_change, trend)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_spanners()
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.width = pct(100),
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    heading.align = "left",
    table.border.top.color = "black",
    row.striping.include_table_body = TRUE
  ) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—")
```
:::

### Row - Table 2 

::: {.card title="Table 2: Detection Method Proportions" fill="false"}
```{r}
#| label: gt-table-detection
# --code-- Insert table 2 of detection method prop
methods <- list(clin_prop = "clinical", 
                epi_prop = "epi",
                lab_prop = "lab")

cases_filtered <- cases_year %>% filter(!is.na(measles_clinical),
                                     !is.na(measles_total),
                                     !is.na(measles_epi_linked),
                                     !is.na(measles_lab_confirmed))
yearly_totals <- cases_filtered %>% group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    total = sum(measles_total),
    clinical = sum(measles_clinical),
    epi = sum(measles_epi_linked),
    lab = sum(measles_lab_confirmed),
    .groups = "drop")

props <- function(col) {
  yearly_totals[[col]] / yearly_totals$total
}

propsbyyear <- bind_cols(
  select(yearly_totals, year),
  map_dfc(methods, props)
)

plot_long <- propsbyyear %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(clin_prop, epi_prop, lab_prop),
               names_to = "method",
               values_to = "proportion")

#Check boxes to select detection method to use

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Cases by Detection Method"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      checkboxGroupInput(
        inputId = "detection_types",
        label = "Select Detection Methods:",
        choices = c("Clinical" = "clin_prop",
                    "Epi-Linked" = "epi_prop",
                    "Lab Confirmed" = "lab_prop"),
        selected = c("clin_prop", "epi_prop", "lab_prop")  # all checked by default
      )
    ),
    mainPanel(
      gt_output("detection_table")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output) {
output$detection_table <- render_gt({
    req(input$detection_types)
    
    selected_cols <- input$detection_types
    table_data <- propsbyyear |> select(year, all_of(selected_cols))
    
    col_labels <- list(year = md("**Year**"))
    if ("clin_prop" %in% selected_cols) col_labels$clin_prop <- md("**Clinical**")
    if ("epi_prop"  %in% selected_cols) col_labels$epi_prop  <- md("**Epi-Linked**")
    if ("lab_prop"  %in% selected_cols) col_labels$lab_prop  <- md("**Lab Confirmed**")
    
    tbl <- table_data |>
      gt() |>
      cols_label(.list = col_labels) |>
      fmt_percent(columns = all_of(selected_cols), decimals = 1) |>
      tab_options(
        table.width = pct(100),
        column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
        heading.align = "left",
        table.border.top.color = "black",
        row.striping.include_table_body = TRUE
      )
    
    if (length(selected_cols) > 1) {
      tbl <- tbl |>
        tab_spanner(
          label = md("**Proportion of Total Cases by Detection Method**"),
          columns = all_of(selected_cols)
        ) |>
        tab_style(
          style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
          locations = cells_column_spanners()
        )
    }
    
    for (col in selected_cols) {
      tbl <- tbl |>
        tab_style(
          style = cell_fill(color = "#D4EFDF"),
          locations = cells_body(
            columns = all_of(col),
            rows = table_data[[col]] == do.call(pmax, c(table_data[selected_cols], na.rm = TRUE))
          )
        )
    }
    
    tbl
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
